queries.question: Give me the clubs that every high school has.
queries.sql: SELECT Clubs.club_name  from High_Schools_Clubs join Clubs on High_Schools_Clubs.club_id = Clubs.id join High_Schools on High_Schools_Clubs.high_school_id = High_Schools.id   GROUP BY High_Schools_Clubs.club_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT High_Schools_Clubs.high_school_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  High_Schools)

queries.question: Give me the clubs that every high school has.
queries.sql: select high_schools.name , clubs.club_name from High_Schools_Clubs join Clubs on High_Schools_Clubs.club_id = Clubs.id join High_Schools on High_Schools_Clubs.high_school_id = High_Schools.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?club_name WHERE {
  ?high_schools_clubs a :High_Schools_Clubs .
  ?clubs a :Clubs .
  ?high_schools_clubs p:hasClubs ?clubs .
  ?high_schools a :High_Schools .
  ?high_schools_clubs p:hasHigh_Schools ?high_schools .
  ?high_schools p:name ?name .
  ?clubs p:club_name ?club_name .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Give me the clubs that every high school has.
